title: BetterBlocked
description:
✨Improves all aspects of the game✨ - 
🌍Completely client side🌍
body:
# **BetterBlocked**
### By CoolStop

This is a modpack with everything you need + more!

100% CLIENT SIDE!!!

- Visual improvements
- UI improvements
- Preformance improvements
- Tools and utilities

Notable mods include:
- Axiom
- Essential
- Modmenu
- Sodium
- Iris
- FancyMenu
- Zoomify

Notable resource packs include:
- BetterFonts - By me!
- BetterNames - Also by me!!!!!!
- Reimagined GUI (Dark)
